sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the images, I can see the black F has moved to the right side and is now overlapping with the yellow F. The charcoal F is on the left side. Let me check the current segmentation to see if the level is completed or what state we're in.
The images show:
- Step 230: Black F near yellow F
- Step 231: Black F overlapping yellow F more
- Step 232: Black F overlapping yellow F even more
- Step 233: Black F fully overlapping yellow F
The goal seems to be to move the black F to overlap with the yellow F. Let me check if the level is complete now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min_r}-{max_r}, cols={min_c}-{max_c}")
print("Last action result:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

I see the black F is now at rows 45-53, cols 54-62, and the yellow F is at rows 45-53, cols 51-53. They're adjacent but not overlapping. The charcoal F is at rows 45-53, cols 0-8.
Wait, looking more carefully:
- Yellow F: rows 45-53, cols 51-53 (only 27 pixels - seems like part of it)
- Black F: rows 45-53, cols 54-62 (40 pixels)
- Charcoal F: rows 45-53, cols 0-8 (45 pixels)
The black F and yellow F are at the same rows but different columns. They seem to be adjacent. The yellow F is only 27 pixels now (was 45), suggesting part of it got covered/merged with the black F.
Actually wait - the yellow F was originally at rows 45-53, cols 51-59 (45 pixels). Now it's at rows 45-53, cols 51-53 (27 pixels). The black F is at rows 45-53, cols 54-62 (40 pixels).
It seems like the black F has moved past the yellow F. The yellow F is now only the left part (cols 51-53), and the black F is to the right (cols 54-62).
I think I overshot. The goal might be to exactly overlap the black F with the yellow F. Let me move LEFT to align them.
